Video.summary: Take a peek at the region's earliest recorded inhabitants, the Canaanites.
Video.title: The Land of Canaan

The Land of Canaan
The Land of Canaan

Video.title: The Arrival of the Israelites

Video.summary: Survey the topography and layout of perhaps the most important city in religious history.
Video.title: Jerusalem - An Introduction to the City

Image.alt: Jerusalem - An Introduction to the City
Jerusalem - An Introduction to the City

Video.summary: Grasp the development of biblical Hebrew script, and examine rare examples.
Video.title: The Jerusalem of David and Solomon

Image.alt: The Jerusalem of David and Solomon
The Jerusalem of David and Solomon

Video.summary: Grasp the diversity of early South American cultures.
Video.title: South America's Lost Cradle of Civilization

Image.alt: South America's Lost Cradle of Civilization
South America's Lost Cradle of Civilization

Video.summary: Explore the means of subsistence for Peru's coastal and inland valley cities.
Video.title: Discovering Peru's Earliest Cities

Image.alt: Discovering Peru's Earliest Cities
Discovering Peru's Earliest Cities
Discovering Peru's Earliest Cities

Video.summary: Here, investigate the important Monte Verde site and its view into everyday life 15,000 years ago.
Video.title: South America's First People

Image.alt: South America's First People
South America's First People
South America's First People

Video.summary: Observe pivotal changes in northern Peruvian societies in 1800-900 B.C.
Video.title: Ceramics, Textiles, and Organized States

Image.alt: Ceramics, Textiles, and Organized States
Ceramics, Textiles, and Organized States
Ceramics, Textiles, and Organized States

Video.summary: Consider why wandering ancient humans left the forests and plains to create settlements.
Video.title: The Lure of the City

Image.alt: The Lure of the City
The Lure of the City
The Lure of the City

Video.summary: Built in layers on a small mound, the world's first city offers a window into the Neolithic era.
Video.title: Catalhoyuk - First Experiment in Urban Living

Image.alt: Catalhoyuk - First Experiment in Urban Living
Catalhoyuk - First Experiment in Urban Living
Catalhoyuk - First Experiment in Urban Living

Video.summary: Look past the biblical story and find out what architectural remains suggest about Jericho.
Video.title: Jericho and Its Walls

Image.alt: Jericho and Its Walls
Jericho and Its Walls
Jericho and Its Walls

Video.summary: Located in the heart of Mesopotamia, Uruk exhibits many hallmarks of ancient civilization.
Video.title: Uruk - City of Gilgamesh

Uruk - City of Gilgamesh
Uruk - City of Gilgamesh

Video.summary: Examine how immense wealth and privilege'for some'left its imprint on the city and its history
Video.title: Oscar Wilde's Decadent London

Image.alt: Oscar Wilde's Decadent London
Oscar Wilde's Decadent London
Oscar Wilde's Decadent London

Video.summary: Uncover the history of a church that has been so much more than a place of worship for the people of London
Video.title: St. Paul's Cathedral in Faith, Fire, and Sin

Image.alt: St. Paul's Cathedral in Faith, Fire, and Sin
St. Paul's Cathedral in Faith, Fire, and Sin
St. Paul's Cathedral in Faith, Fire, and Sin

Video.summary: Go back in time to an evening in March of 1941, when the Caf' de Paris was destroyed in the Blitz.
Video.title: Getting Blitzed at London's Café de Paris

Image.alt: Getting Blitzed at London's Café de Paris
Getting Blitzed at London's Café de Paris
Getting Blitzed at London's Café de Paris

Video.summary: Look back on the history of a three-block stretch of city street and see why it became such a magnet.
Video.title: On Carnaby Street during the Swinging '60s

Image.alt: On Carnaby Street during the Swinging '60s
On Carnaby Street during the Swinging '60s
On Carnaby Street during the Swinging '60s

Video.summary: Your first "crime of the century" is the mysterious murder of a Hollywood director in 1922.
Video.grandparentTitle: Crimes of the Century: A Selective History of Infamy
Video.title: A Murder That Almost Killed Hollywood

Image.alt: A Murder That Almost Killed Hollywood
A Murder That Almost Killed Hollywood
A Murder That Almost Killed Hollywood

Video.summary: The ghastly murder of Bridget Cleary takes you into the mystery of human psychology.

Video.title: The Deadly Irish Fairy Tale of 1895

Image.alt: The Deadly Irish Fairy Tale of 1895
The Deadly Irish Fairy Tale of 1895
The Deadly Irish Fairy Tale of 1895

Video.summary: Dive into a cycle of mystery and violence in early 20th century Sarajevo.

Video.title: The Sarajevo Conspiracy of 1914

Image.alt: The Sarajevo Conspiracy of 1914
The Sarajevo Conspiracy of 1914

Video.summary: Delve into one of the best-known and most debated murder cases in American history.

Murderous Maids: The Papin Sisters of France

Video.summary: What appears to be a seamless plot to kill a political rival owes much to chance.
